title: Can you disable export functionality?
excerpt:
Hello. Due to company policy, it is required that users should not be able to export the boards contents to Excel or any other filetype. Is there some configuration for disabling the export functionality? 
Thank you in a…

posts.author: tonydee (Antonis Despotakis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. Due to company policy, it is required that users should not be able to export the boards contents to Excel or any other filetype. Is there some configuration for disabling the export functionality?

Thank you in advance
Antonis

posts.author: cassandra (Cassandra Eddington)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @tonydee! Hope you’re well! Apologies for such a late reply. I’m just jumping into the community today to help out a bit, and I saw your question.

The quick answer: You can disable export to excel! This is an Enterprise feature. Here’s a quick preview of the Permissions tab for Enterprise:

image2070×1506 209 KB

There are a few more permissions options that were cut off in my screenshot. They are “Upload profile picture” and “Create Workspaces”. Both options can be limited as well.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
